items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to AI-generated parameters. However, the evidence provided does not include specific checks or confirmations regarding the expected outcomes of this validation. The linked use case and prior steps do not demonstrate the necessary validations or outcomes that would confirm the scenario behavior, leading to an inconclusive status.
